codeReview.summary: The feature creates a comprehensive e2e test file with 14 test cases covering all 5 VAL-SESSION-VOICE assertions (001-005). Tests for VAL-SESSION-VOICE-001 (voice controls visible), VAL-SESSION-VOICE-002 (TTS toggle), VAL-SESSION-VOICE-003 (TTS voice settings), and VAL-SESSION-VOICE-005 (voice playback indicator) are well-implemented and pass. However, VAL-SESSION-VOICE-004 tests for STT error with actionable message are incomplete — they cannot trigger the actual error condition and therefore cannot verify the actionable start command is displayed.

issues.description: VAL-SESSION-VOICE-004 test 'Clicking mic shows error when STT server is not running' does not actually trigger the STT error condition. The test only verifies the mic button is visible with correct attributes, but doesn't test what happens when the STT server is down. The comment explicitly states 'We can't easily trigger the error without mocking the STT server' — the validation contract requires testing STT error when server is down with actionable message, but this test doesn't cover it.

VAL-SESSION-VOICE-004 test 'Error message is actionable with start command' does not verify the actionable message. The comment states 'We can't easily trigger the error without mocking the STT server'. The test only checks that the voice-controls container is visible, but does not verify that an error message with a start command is displayed. The validation contract explicitly requires 'actionable message with start command' but this is not tested.

The test file defines a `clearAllData` helper function (line 17-31) that calls `${BACKEND_URL}/api/export/clear` but this API endpoint may not exist. The function is defined but never used in any tests — it was likely intended for cleanup but the tests use localStorage removal in afterEach instead.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature tests do not use the `clearAllData` helper that was defined in the file. The helper makes an API call to `${BACKEND_URL}/api/export/clear` which should be verified to exist or the helper should be removed. The tests rely on `localStorage.removeItem` in afterEach instead.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: e2e/session-voice-comprehensive.spec.ts lines 17-31 defines clearAllData but it's never called; afterEach uses localStorage removal at line 108

sharedStateObservations.observation: The e2e-worker skill procedure may not have addressed how to trigger STT server down scenarios in tests. The worker's test comments explicitly state 'We can't easily trigger the error without mocking the STT server' — this suggests the skill didn't provide guidance on how to simulate server-down conditions for error message verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript comments at lines 344-345 and 358-359 in session-voice-comprehensive.spec.ts

summary: The comprehensive session voice e2e tests pass all 14 test cases and provide good coverage for VAL-SESSION-VOICE-001, 002, 003, and 005. However, the critical VAL-SESSION-VOICE-004 tests for STT error handling with actionable start command are not actually tested — the tests acknowledge they cannot trigger the error condition. The validation contract requires 'STT error when server down with actionable message', but the current tests only verify the error container structure exists, not that it displays the correct actionable message. A fix is needed to actually trigger the STT server-down error and verify the actionable start command is shown to the user.
